title: Environment Variables Support
description: Add support for defining and managing environment variables in jarvy.toml, enabling automatic shell configuration and .env file generation
acceptance_criteria: Declare environment variables in jarvy.toml [env] section
Optionally update shell rc files (.bashrc, .zshrc, fish config)
Handle secrets with prompting (hidden input support)
Backup shell rc files before modification

tasks.title: Add EnvConfig to config parsing
tasks.description: Extend src/config.rs with EnvConfig, EnvValue, and EnvSettings structs
subtasks: Add EnvValue enum for simple and complex values
Add EnvConfig struct with vars, secrets, config fields
Add EnvSettings struct with shell, update_rc, generate_dotenv, dotenv_path
Update Config struct to include env field
Write unit tests for config parsing

tasks.title: Create env module structure
subtasks: Create src/env/shell.rs for rc file modification

tasks.title: Implement variable expansion
tasks.description: Add template variable expansion with context
subtasks: Create EnvContext struct with home_dir, current_dir, username, tool_paths
Add JARVY_{TOOL}_PATH expansion for tool paths

tasks.title: Implement shell rc file modification
tasks.description: Update shell configuration files with exports
subtasks: Detect shell rc file path (bash, zsh, fish)
Backup existing rc file before modification
Remove old Jarvy section if exists (marker comments)
Add new exports between jarvy_start and jarvy_end markers

tasks.title: Implement secret prompting
tasks.description: Handle secret values with interactive prompting

tasks.title: Add CLI env command
tasks.description: Add jarvy env command with subcommands
subtasks: Add --shell flag for rc file only
Add --export flag for shell eval output

tasks.title: Integrate into setup flow
subtasks: Apply env vars after tool installation

tasks.title: Write tests
tasks.description: Create comprehensive tests for env module

tasks.title: Update documentation
subtasks: Add env section to configuration docs
Create examples for Node.js, Go, AWS projects

implementation_notes.shell_support: bash, zsh, fish with appropriate syntax per shell
implementation_notes.gitignore: Optionally add .env to .gitignore to prevent secret commits
implementation_notes.ci_mode: Skip interactive prompts and use defaults in CI

risks.description: Shell rc corruption could break user shell
risks.mitigation: Always backup, use clear markers, validate syntax

risks.description: Secrets in .env could be committed to Git
risks.mitigation: Auto-add .env to .gitignore, warn user about secret exposure
